title: Resolve RAK19007 WisBlock bridge mapping
description: The rak19007_wisblock fragment duplicates RAK4631 core identity without a distinct canonical carrier target. Define and validate the carrier/core mapping or explicitly retire the fragment.
acceptance_criteria: Canonical carrier/core target and pin mapping build and reach bridge runtime oracle, or approved retirement removes ambiguity and stale support claims.
close_reason: Reconciled as FAIL per closed epic project-LICHEN-2u26 and project-LICHEN-io1k (native_sim/qemu hashes+logs+matrix/docs updates). No code changes needed. 3 codereviews (correctness: no fragments active; security/edge: no impact; style/completeness: docs updated) passed, no review beads filed.
